summary: Iteration 24: Tested 5 bug fixes from user report. 4/5 PASS, 1 PARTIAL ISSUE (Coach dialog footer buttons hidden at 800px viewport)

ui_bugs.issue: At 800px viewport height, the dialog footer buttons (Annuler/Enregistrer) are positioned at y=1055px which is outside the 800px viewport. Dialog uses translate-y-[-50%] centering which pushes bottom content out of view.

issues: Console warnings about duplicate keys in COLOR_OPTIONS array - same colors repeated: #FF453A, #64D2FF, #FFD60A, #30D158, #0A84FF

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Coach dialog positioning - adjust dialog to stay within viewport at 800px height. Consider using fixed positioning or adjusting max-height calculation to account for centering offset.
critical_code_review_comments: CoachesPage.js line 51-54: COLOR_OPTIONS array has duplicate values causing React key warnings. Should use unique keys or deduplicate colors.

success_rate.backend: 100% (payments API correctly returns 'Inconnu' for missing members)
success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 tests pass, coach dialog positioning issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Most bug fixes verified working. Coach dialog needs positioning fix for 800px viewport - footer buttons outside viewport. All other fixes PASS.

bug_1_payments_colors.description: Payments page colors are BLUE (var(--color-accent)), not green

evidence.buttons: Nouveau planning, Payé buttons all use bg-[var(--color-accent)]

bug_2_late_payments_names.description: En retard tab shows 'Inconnu' instead of empty for missing members

bug_3_coach_dialog.description: Dialog has max-h-[85vh] and scrollable content, but footer buttons are outside 800px viewport

evidence.issue: translate-y-[-50%] centering pushes dialog bottom (1080px) outside viewport (800px)

bug_4_attendance_weeks.description: Attendance page week cells show actual training data, not all zeros

bug_5_onboarding_sort.description: Onboarding cards sorted alphabetically, clicking step does NOT reorder

bug_6_dashboard_kpi.description: Dashboard KPI cards display correctly without overflow
